globalRule.description: Records where plan name is null, but plan ID is not null, monthly charge is positive, SIM type is not null, and account status is not null.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Plan_Name@ IS NULL AND @Plan_ID@ IS NOT NULL AND @Monthly_Charge@ > 0 AND @SIM_Type@ IS NOT NULL AND @Account_Status@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Records with a negative monthly charge, despite having non-null plan ID, SIM type, and account status.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Monthly_Charge@ < 0 AND @Plan_ID@ IS NOT NULL AND @SIM_Type@ IS NOT NULL AND @Account_Status@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Records where plan ID is null, but plan name is not null, monthly charge is positive, SIM type is not null, and account status is not null.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Plan_ID@ IS NULL AND @Plan_Name@ IS NOT NULL AND @Monthly_Charge@ > 0 AND @SIM_Type@ IS NOT NULL AND @Account_Status@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Records with a monthly charge below 100, but having non-null plan ID, plan name, and SIM type, suggesting a potential mismatch.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Monthly_Charge@ < 100 AND @Plan_ID@ IS NOT NULL AND @Plan_Name@ IS NOT NULL AND @SIM_Type@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Records with zero monthly charge despite having non-null plan ID, plan name, account status, and SIM type.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Monthly_Charge@ = 0 AND @Plan_ID@ IS NOT NULL AND @Plan_Name@ IS NOT NULL AND @Account_Status@ IS NOT NULL AND @SIM_Type@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Records where the mobile number length is not 10 digits, with non-null subscriber ID and customer name.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE LENGTH(CAST(@Mobile_Number@ AS STRING)) != 10 AND @Subscriber_ID@ IS NOT NULL AND @Customer_Name@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Records with a monthly charge exceeding 1000, but missing plan ID or plan name, for accounts with a non-null SIM type.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Monthly_Charge@ > 1000 AND (@Plan_ID@ IS NULL OR @Plan_Name@ IS NULL) AND @SIM_Type@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Identifies cases where a mobile number is associated with the same subscriber ID more than once, for accounts with a non-null status.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE (@Mobile_Number@, @Subscriber_ID@) IN (SELECT @Mobile_Number@, @Subscriber_ID@ FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Account_Status@ IS NOT NULL GROUP BY @Mobile_Number@, @Subscriber_ID@ HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);

globalRule.description: Records with a positive monthly charge but missing associated plan ID or plan name, for accounts where status is not null.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Monthly_Charge@ > 0 AND (@Plan_ID@ IS NULL OR @Plan_Name@ IS NULL) AND @Account_Status@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Flags records where Plan_ID and Plan_Name are present, but Monthly_Charge is null, indicating an incomplete charge definition for the subscriber's plan.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.Telecom_Dataset_500Rows` WHERE Plan_ID IS NOT NULL AND Plan_Name IS NOT NULL AND Monthly_Charge IS NULL AND Subscriber_ID IS NOT NULL
